rows.label: qev025502_MSG0001
rows.name:
...So slow, slow, slow! You're way too
slow! Just what in the world is that
foolish brother of mine, Sostenasa, doing?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0002
rows.name:
Even now, Earthlings are fighting and
risking their lives... Good grief!
This calls for a harsh punishment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask him why he's so angry.

rows.label: qev025502_SEL0021
rows.name: Try to calm Fojimua down for now.

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0003
rows.name:
Are you... a member of BLADE? I
am a mechanic working at your
facilities. My name is Fojimua.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0004
rows.name:
Recently, you see, I've had my hands full
with work, so I asked my brother, Sostenasa,
to repair some military vehicles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0005
rows.name:
However, no matter how much time passes,
I receive no word that the job is finished...
I am in a terrible bind, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0006
rows.name: Are you... a member of BLADE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0007
rows.name:
I've shown an unsightly side of
myself to someone fighting on the
front lines. I am deeply sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Recently, a job I entrusted to my brother,
Sostenasa, hasn't been going well, you
see. I just... lost my temper a bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0009
rows.name:
Lately, my brother hasn't been putting his heart
into his work. That's why I came to give him a
good scolding, or "katsu" as you Earthlings say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0010
rows.name:
Good grief... Even as we speak, BLADEs
are risking their lives fighting... Just
what could he possibly be thinking?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0011
rows.name:
...I see. So you're the BLADE
who's been helping Sostenasa...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0012
rows.name:
Thank you so much. Thanks to you,
it seems Sostenasa might be able to
find what he had lost sight of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025502_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Well, please speak with him directly for
the details. I just hope this incident helps
him regain his passion for his work...[ST:wait ]
